---
title: "Oncology Professionals' Knowledge, Attitudes, and Referral Behavior Toward Long-Term Care for Elderly Cancer Patients: A Systematic Review"
subtitle: "A Systematic Literature Review"
date: "2026-03-31"
author: "Automated Literature Review Pipeline"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    cite-method: citeproc
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    linestretch: 1.5
  docx:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
bibliography: references.bib
csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl
---

{{< include sections/00-abstract.qmd >}}

# Introduction

{{< include sections/01-introduction.qmd >}}

# Methods

{{< include sections/02-methods.qmd >}}

# Results

## Knowledge, Attitudes, and Behavior of Oncology Professionals Regarding Long-Term Care

{{< include sections/03-kab-professionals.qmd >}}

## Cancer Patients' Knowledge, Attitudes, and Willingness Toward Long-Term Care

{{< include sections/04-kab-patients.qmd >}}

## Barriers and Facilitators to Long-Term Care Referral

{{< include sections/05-barriers.qmd >}}

## Discrepancies Between Professional and Patient Perspectives

{{< include sections/06-discrepancy.qmd >}}

## Care Coordination Models and Survivorship Care

{{< include sections/07-care-models.qmd >}}

# Discussion

{{< include sections/08-discussion.qmd >}}

# Funding {.unnumbered}

This research did not receive any specific grant from funding agencies in the public, commercial, or not-for-profit sectors. The authors declare no competing interests.

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
